name: sanyukt-parivaar
description: Sanyukt Parivaar & Rich Life Pvt.Ltd. - Full Stack App

scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm run install-all && npm run build-client && mkdir -p public && cp -rv client/public/. public/
scripts.install-all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
